name: Bohdan Melnichenko
description: Senior full-stack developer from Ukraine — React, Node.js, Next.js, and lately a lot of AI.
tagline: Senior full-stack developer from Ukraine. I build things for the web — React, Node.js, Next.js, and lately a lot of AI.
status: These days I do that full-time, shipping several products I'm proud of. They aren't listed here — those stories I'd rather tell in person. Busy, but never too busy for a good conversation: the links at the bottom all reach me.
subline: My spare time goes into small builds — below are the ones I remembered to add.
outro: I've spent most of my life at a computer, and the last couple of years more than ever — everything keeps speeding up, me included. So to slow down, I walk without my phone, read paper books, and write by hand. Of all the stacks I've worked with, this one makes me the happiest.
